seoTitle: One Mile vs Oolong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between One Mile and Oolong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: One Mile vs Oolong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in One Mile and Oolong.
heading: One Mile vs Oolong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between One Mile, New South Wales and Oolong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oolong has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to One Mile (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is One Mile or Oolong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: One Mile has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Oolong scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: One Mile scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Oolong scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in One Mile or Oolong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oolong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
